case_title: MOLLY MOLLIN VS. KENNETH PRESTON et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOLLIN, MOLLY AS TO DEFENDANT PRESTON, KENNETH DOES 1 TO 50 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JAN-03-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-30-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-19-2002
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR DEC-03-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEC-03-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT; FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOLLIN, MOLLY SERVED NOV-18-2002, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PRESTON, KENNETH
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY ATTORNEY SCHNEIDER, RONALD P.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-03-2003 CONTINUED TO FEB-14-2003 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT PRESTON, KENNETH
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR MAR-03-2003. FEB-14-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE MAR-13-2003.
DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR DANIEL JOSEPH LANAHAN.
ARBITRATOR PATRICK BRENNEN STREB APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION MAR-19-2003 THROUGH JUN-17-2003.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-14-2003 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT - ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION; EACH PARTY TO BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS
LETTER, PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY, RONALD P. SCHNEIDER TO ARBITRATION DEPT.; IN RE: CASE SETTLED
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-14-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CORRESPONDENCE, ARBITRATOR, PATRICK B. STREB TO COUNSEL; ARBITRATION HEARING DATE: MAY 30, 2003
AMENDMENT TO COMPLAINT DEFENDANT SUED HEREIN AS DOE 1 & 301 TO BE MGM CONSTRUCTION
